tools.name: authentication.postUsers2FaLogin
tools.description:
When a user has 2FA enabled, this is the second call to perform after
`/v2/users/login` call.

Creates and returns a bearer token in JWT format that you can use to authenticate with Docker Hub APIs.

The returned token is used in the HTTP Authorization header like `Authorization: Bearer {TOKEN}`.

Most Docker Hub APIs require this token either to consume or to get detailed information. For example, to list images in a private repository.

tools.name: authentication.postUsersLogin
tools.description:
Creates and returns a bearer token in JWT format that you can use to
authenticate with Docker Hub APIs.

The returned token is used in the HTTP Authorization header like `Authorization: Bearer {TOKEN}`.

Most Docker Hub APIs require this token either to consume or to get detailed information. For example, to list images in a private repository.

tools.name: discovery.getNamespace
tools.description: Gets metadata associated with specified namespace, including extra repos associated with the namespace

tools.name: discovery.getNamespaces
tools.description: Gets a list of your namespaces and repos which have data available

tools.name: namespaces.getNamespaceDataByTimespan
tools.description: Gets a list of URLs that can be used to download the pull data for the given namespace and timespan

tools.name: namespaces.getNamespaceTimespanMetadata
tools.description: Gets info about data for the given namespace and timespan

tools.name: namespaces.getNamespaceTimespans
tools.description: Gets a list of timespans of the given type that have data for the given namespace and year

tools.name: namespaces.getNamespaceYears
tools.description: Gets a list of years that have data for the given namespace

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source
